name: Cranberry Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cranberries, orange peel, oranges, raisins, and water in a large saucepan. Cover and simmer over medium heat until the cranberries are soft.
2. Add the pecans and sugar; stir well. Simmer, uncovered, for 10-15 minutes, stirring often.
3. Allow to cool completely before spooning into covered containers. Refrigerate.
To Serve: Use as a relish with poultry or pork or spread on biscuits or toast.
SOURCE: TASTE OF HOME Magazine; October/November 1994 issue
